f, f_der: futureCond
t, t_der: list event
res: futureCond
H: fc_der f ev0 f_der
H0: f_der <> fc_singleton bot
H1: t = (ev0 :: t_der)%mylist
H2: futureSubtraction_linear f_der t_der res
IHfutureSubtraction_linear: forall f3 : futureCond,
futureCondEntail f_der f3 ->
exists f4 : futureCond,
  futureSubtraction_linear
    f3 t_der f4 /\
  futureCondEntail res f4
f3: futureCond
H3: futureCondEntail f f3
H4: forall (f f3 : futureCond) 
  (ev0 : event) (f_der : futureCond),
futureCondEntail f f3 ->
fc_der f ev0 f_der ->
f_der <> fc_singleton bot ->
exists deriv : futureCond,
  fc_der f3 ev0 deriv /\
  deriv <> fc_singleton bot
exists f4 : futureCond,
  futureSubtraction_linear f3 t f4 /\
  futureCondEntail res f4

f, f_der: futureCond

res: futureCond

H2: futureSubtraction_linear f_der t_der res
IHfutureSubtraction_linear: forall f3 : futureCond,
futureCondEntail f_der f3 ->
exists f4 : futureCond,
  futureSubtraction_linear
    f3 t_der f4 /\
  futureCondEntail res f4
f3: futureCond

H4: exists deriv : futureCond,
  fc_der f3 ev0 deriv /\
  deriv <> fc_singleton bot

  futureSubtraction_linear f3 t f4 /\
  futureCondEntail res f4

futureCondEntail t1 t2 ->
fc_der t1 ev1 deriv0 ->
fc_der t1 ev1 deriv0 ->
futureCondEntail deriv0 deriv

  futureSubtraction_linear f3 t f4 /\
  futureCondEntail res f4

H2: futureSubtraction_linear f_der t_der res
deriv, f4: futureCond
H8: futureSubtraction_linear deriv t_der f4
H9: futureCondEntail res f4
f3: futureCond
H3: futureCondEntail f f3
H4: fc_der f3 ev0 deriv
H6: deriv <> fc_singleton bot
H5: futureCondEntail f_der deriv
exists f4 : futureCond,
  futureSubtraction_linear f3 t f4 /\
  futureCondEntail res f4

forall (f_ctx : futureCond) (t : theta)
  (f_ctx' : futureCond) (rho3 : rho),
futureSubtraction f_ctx t f_ctx' ->
trace_model rho3 t ->
exists f_ctx'0 : futureCond,
  futureSubtraction_linear f_ctx rho3 f_ctx'0 /\
  futureCondEntail f_ctx' f_ctx'0


forall (f_ctx : futureCond) (t : theta)
  (f_ctx' : futureCond) (rho3 : rho),
futureSubtraction f_ctx t f_ctx' ->
trace_model rho3 t ->
exists f_ctx'0 : futureCond,
  futureSubtraction_linear f_ctx rho3 f_ctx'0 /\
  futureCondEntail f_ctx' f_ctx'0

f_ctx': futureCond

  futureSubtraction_linear f_ctx rho3 f_ctx'0 /\
  futureCondEntail f_ctx' f_ctx'0

  futureSubtraction_linear 
    (fc_singleton t) rho3 f_ctx'0 /\

H5: futureSubtraction_linear f2 rho3 f_ctx'1
H6: futureCondEntail f4 f_ctx'1
H1: trace_model rho3 t
futureCondEntail (fc_conj f3 f4) f_ctx'1

  futureSubtraction_linear f rho3 f_ctx'0 /\

H7: trace_model rho1 t_der
H6: futureSubtraction_linear f rho3 f_ctx'0
futureCondEntail res f_ctx'0
 exact H9.

trace_model rho3 t ->
exists f_ctx'0 : futureCond,
  futureSubtraction_linear f rho3 f_ctx'0 /\
  futureCondEntail f2 f_ctx'0

forall (f_ctx : futureCond) (t : theta)
  (f_ctx' : futureCond) (rho3 : rho) (h1 : heap)
  (e : expr) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho)
  (f3 : futureCond) (v : val) (f0 : futureCond),
futureSubtraction f_ctx t f_ctx' ->
trace_model rho3 t ->
bigstep h1 rho1 f_ctx e h2 (rho1 ++ rho3) f3 v ->
bigstep h1 nil fc_default e h2 rho3 f0 v ->
futureCondEntail (fc_conj f_ctx' f0) f3


forall (f_ctx : futureCond) (t : theta)
  (f_ctx' : futureCond) (rho3 : rho) (h1 : heap)
  (e : expr) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho)
  (f3 : futureCond) (v : val) (f0 : futureCond),
futureSubtraction f_ctx t f_ctx' ->
trace_model rho3 t ->
bigstep h1 rho1 f_ctx e h2 (rho1 ++ rho3) f3 v ->
bigstep h1 nil fc_default e h2 rho3 f0 v ->
futureCondEntail (fc_conj f_ctx' f0) f3

e: expr
h2: heap

v: val
f0: futureCond

H0: trace_model rho3 t
H1: bigstep h1 rho1 f_ctx e h2 (rho1 ++ rho3) f3 v
H2: bigstep h1 nil fc_default e h2 rho3 f0 v
futureCondEntail (fc_conj f_ctx' f0) f3

H2: bigstep h1 nil fc_default e h2 rho3 f0 v
H3: forall (h1 : heap) (rho1 : rho)
  (f_ctx : futureCond) (e : expr) 
  (h2 h3 : heap) (rho2 : rho) 
  (f3 : futureCond) (v : val) 
  (rho3 : list event) (f0 f_ctx' : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 f_ctx e h2 rho2 f3 v ->
rho2 = rho1 ++ rho3 ->
bigstep h1 nil fc_default e h3 rho3 f0 v ->
futureSubtraction_linear f_ctx rho3 f_ctx' ->
f3 = fc_conj f0 f_ctx'
futureCondEntail (fc_conj f_ctx' f0) f3

  (f_ctx : futureCond) (e : expr)

futureSubtraction_linear f_ctx rho3 f_ctx' ->
f3 = fc_conj f0 f_ctx'
e0:= identity: forall (A : Type) (x : A), x = x
f_ctx'0: futureCond
H4: futureSubtraction_linear f_ctx rho3 f_ctx'0
H6: futureCondEntail f_ctx' f_ctx'0
futureCondEntail (fc_conj f_ctx' f0) f3

  
f_ctx: futureCond
t: theta
f_ctx': futureCond
rho3: rho
h1: heap
e: expr
h2: heap
rho1: rho
f3: futureCond
v: val
f0: futureCond
H: futureSubtraction f_ctx t f_ctx'
H0: trace_model rho3 t
H1: bigstep h1 rho1 f_ctx e h2 (rho1 ++ rho3) f3 v
H2: bigstep h1 nil fc_default e h2 rho3 f0 v
f_ctx'0: futureCond
H3: f3 = fc_conj f0 f_ctx'0
e0:= identity: forall (A : Type) (x : A), x = x
H4: futureSubtraction_linear f_ctx rho3 f_ctx'0
H6: futureCondEntail f_ctx' f_ctx'0
futureCondEntail (fc_conj f_ctx' f0) f3

  (rho1 ++ rho3) (fc_conj f0 f_ctx'0) v
H2: bigstep h1 nil fc_default e h2 rho3 f0 v
e0:= identity: forall (A : Type) (x : A), x = x
H4: futureSubtraction_linear f_ctx rho3 f_ctx'0
H6: futureCondEntail f_ctx' f_ctx'0
futureCondEntail (fc_conj f_ctx' f0)
  (fc_conj f0 f_ctx'0)

forall (h3 : heap) (e : expr) (h2 : heap) (rho0 : rho)
  (f3 : futureCond) (v : val) (rho3 : list event)
  (rho1 : rho) (f : futureCond),
bigstep h3 rho1 f e h2 rho0 f3 v ->
bigstep h3 (rho3 ++ rho1) f e h2 (rho3 ++ rho0) f3 v


forall (h3 : heap) (e : expr) (h2 : heap) (rho0 : rho)
  (f3 : futureCond) (v : val) (rho3 : list event)
  (rho1 : rho) (f : futureCond),
bigstep h3 rho1 f e h2 rho0 f3 v ->
bigstep h3 (rho3 ++ rho1) f e h2 (rho3 ++ rho0) f3 v

h2: heap

h1, h2, h3: heap
x: var
e1, e2: expr
v, r: val
rho1, rho2, rho3: rho
f1, f2, f3: futureCond
H: bigstep h1 rho1 f1 e1 h2 rho2 f2 v
H0: bigstep h2 rho2 f2 (subst x v e2) h3 rho3 f3 r
IHbigstep1: forall rho3 : list event,
bigstep h1 (rho3 ++ rho1) f1 e1 h2
  (rho3 ++ rho2) f2 v
IHbigstep2: forall rho4 : list event,
bigstep h2 (rho4 ++ rho2) f2
  (subst x v e2) h3 (rho4 ++ rho3) f3 r
forall rho4 : list event,
bigstep h1 (rho4 ++ rho1) f1 (plet x e1 e2) h3
  (rho4 ++ rho3) f3 r

r: rho
f: futureCond
v: val

bigstep h (rho3 ++ r) f (pval v) h (rho3 ++ r) f v

r: rho
f: futureCond

r': rho
f': futureCond
v: val

bigstep h (rho3 ++ r) f e1 h' 
  (rho3 ++ r') f' v

bigstep h (rho3 ++ r) f
  (pif (pval (vbool true)) e1 e2) h' 
  (rho3 ++ r') f' v

f: futureCond

  (rho3 ++ r') f' v

  (pif (pval (vbool false)) e1 e2) h' 
  (rho3 ++ r') f' v

  (rho3 ++ r) (fc_conj f f_assume) vunit

r: rho

  (rho3 ++ r) f (Fmap.read h loc0)

  (passign (pval (vloc loc0)) (pval v))
  (Fmap.update h loc0 v) 
  (rho3 ++ r) f vunit
fromal_arg: var
e: expr
actual_arg: val
h1, h2: heap
rho1, rho2: rho
f1, f2: futureCond
v: val
H: bigstep h1 rho1 f1 (subst fromal_arg actual_arg e)
  h2 rho2 f2 v

bigstep h1 (rho3 ++ rho1) f1
  (subst fromal_arg actual_arg e) h2
  (rho3 ++ rho2) f2 v

bigstep h1 (rho3 ++ rho1) f1
  (papp (pval (vfun fromal_arg e)) (pval actual_arg))
  h2 (rho3 ++ rho2) f2 v
h: Fmap.fmap Logic.loc Val.value
r: rho
f: futureCond
loc0: Logic.loc
v: val
f': futureCond
H: ~ Fmap.indom h loc0
H0: futureSubtraction_linear f
  (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist f'
forall rho3 : list event,
bigstep h (rho3 ++ r) f (pref (pval v))
  (Fmap.update h loc0 v)
  (rho3 ++
   r ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist)
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc loc0))))
  (vloc loc0)

v, r: val

  (rho0 ++ rho2) f2 v

  (subst x v e2) h3 (rho0 ++ rho3) f3 r
H1: forall (h1 h2 h3 : heap) 
  (x : var) (e1 e2 : expr) 
  (v r : val) (rho1 rho2 rho3 : rho)
  (f1 f2 f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 f1 e1 h2 rho2 f2 v ->
bigstep h2 rho2 f2 (subst x v e2) h3 rho3 f3 r ->
bigstep h1 rho1 f1 (plet x e1 e2) h3 rho3 f3 r
bigstep h1 (rho0 ++ rho1) f1 (plet x e1 e2) h3
  (rho0 ++ rho3) f3 r

x: var
e1, e2: expr
v, r: val
rho1, rho2, rho3: rho
f1, f2, f3: futureCond

H0: bigstep h2 rho2 f2 (subst x v e2) h3 rho3 f3 r
rho0: list event

  (rho0 ++ rho2) f2 v
IHbigstep2: bigstep h2 (rho0 ++ rho2) f2
  (subst x v e2) h3 (rho0 ++ rho3) f3 r
H1: bigstep h1 (rho0 ++ rho1) f1 
  (plet x e1 e2) h3 (rho0 ++ rho3) f3 r
bigstep h1 (rho0 ++ rho1) f1 (plet x e1 e2) h3
  (rho0 ++ rho3) f3 r

  exact H1.

e: expr
actual_arg: val

  h2 rho2 f2 v

  (subst fromal_arg actual_arg e) h2

forall rho3 : list event,
bigstep h1 (rho3 ++ rho1) f1
  (papp (pval (vfun fromal_arg e)) (pval actual_arg))
  h2 (rho3 ++ rho2) f2 v
 
fromal_arg: var
e: expr
actual_arg: val
h1, h2: heap
rho1, rho2: rho
f1, f2: futureCond
v: val
H: bigstep h1 rho1 f1 (subst fromal_arg actual_arg e)
  h2 rho2 f2 v
IHbigstep: forall rho3 : list event,
bigstep h1 (rho3 ++ rho1) f1
  (subst fromal_arg actual_arg e) h2
  (rho3 ++ rho2) f2 v
rho3: list event
bigstep h1 (rho3 ++ rho1) f1
  (papp (pval (vfun fromal_arg e)) (pval actual_arg))
  h2 (rho3 ++ rho2) f2 v
 
fromal_arg: var
e: expr
actual_arg: val
h1, h2: heap
rho1, rho2: rho
f1, f2: futureCond
v: val
H: bigstep h1 rho1 f1 (subst fromal_arg actual_arg e)
  h2 rho2 f2 v
IHbigstep: forall rho3 : list event,
bigstep h1 (rho3 ++ rho1) f1
  (subst fromal_arg actual_arg e) h2
  (rho3 ++ rho2) f2 v
rho3: list event
bigstep h1 (rho3 ++ rho1) f1
  (subst fromal_arg actual_arg e) h2 (rho3 ++ rho2) f2
  v
 exact (IHbigstep rho3).
  
h: Fmap.fmap Logic.loc Val.value
r: rho
f: futureCond
loc0: Logic.loc
v: val
f': futureCond
H: ~ Fmap.indom h loc0
H0: futureSubtraction_linear f
  (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist f'
forall rho3 : list event,
bigstep h (rho3 ++ r) f (pref (pval v))
  (Fmap.update h loc0 v)
  (rho3 ++
   r ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist)
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc loc0))))
  (vloc loc0)

f: futureCond
loc0: Logic.loc
v: val
f': futureCond
H: ~ Fmap.indom h loc0
H0: futureSubtraction_linear f
  (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist f'
rho3: list event
bigstep h (rho3 ++ r) f (pref (pval v))
  (Fmap.update h loc0 v)
  (rho3 ++
   r ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist)
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc loc0))))
  (vloc loc0)

  (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist f'

bigstep h (rho3 ++ r) f (pref (pval v))
  (Fmap.update h loc0 v)
  ((rho3 ++ r) ++
   (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist)
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc loc0))))
  (vloc loc0)

  (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist f'
 exact H0.
Qed.



forall (A B : Type) (h1 h2 h3 : Fmap.fmap A B),
Fmap.disjoint h1 h2 ->
Fmap.disjoint h2 h3 ->
Fmap.disjoint h1 h3 -> Fmap.disjoint h1 (h2 \u h3)


forall (A B : Type) (h1 h2 h3 : Fmap.fmap A B),
Fmap.disjoint h1 h2 ->
Fmap.disjoint h2 h3 ->
Fmap.disjoint h1 h3 -> Fmap.disjoint h1 (h2 \u h3)

  
A, B: Type
h1, h2, h3: Fmap.fmap A B
H: Fmap.disjoint h1 h2
H0: Fmap.disjoint h2 h3
H1: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
Fmap.disjoint h1 (h2 \u h3)

    
A, B: Type
h1, h2, h3: Fmap.fmap A B
H: Fmap.disjoint h1 h2
H0: Fmap.disjoint h2 h3
H1: Fmap.disjoint h1 h3
H2: forall (A B : Type) (h1 h2 h3 : fmap A B),
disjoint h1 (h2 \u h3) =
(disjoint h1 h2 /\ disjoint h1 h3)
Fmap.disjoint h1 (h2 \u h3)

  eauto.
Qed.

Axiom h_subst_pure: forall (t1:loc) t2, t1 = t2.





forall (P : hprop) (e : expr) (Q : val -> hprop)
  (t1 t2 : theta) (rho1 rho2 : rho) (h1 : heap)
  (v : val) (h2 : heap) (f1 f2 f3 : futureCond),
forward P t1 f1 e Q t2 f2 ->
P h1 ->
trace_model rho1 t1 ->
bigstep h1 rho1 f1 e h2 rho2 f3 v ->
Q v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 t2 /\ futureCondEntail f2 f3


forall (P : hprop) (e : expr) (Q : val -> hprop)
  (t1 t2 : theta) (rho1 rho2 : rho) (h1 : heap)
  (v : val) (h2 : heap) (f1 f2 f3 : futureCond),
forward P t1 f1 e Q t2 f2 ->
P h1 ->
trace_model rho1 t1 ->
bigstep h1 rho1 f1 e h2 rho2 f3 v ->
Q v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 t2 /\ futureCondEntail f2 f3

bigstep h1 rho1 f1 e h2 rho2 f3 v ->
Q v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 t2 /\ futureCondEntail f2 f3

Q v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 t2 /\ futureCondEntail f2 f3

e: expr
Q: val -> hprop
t1, t2: theta
f1, f2: futureCond

forall (v : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),

Q v h2 /\

P3: hprop
P4: val -> hprop
t': theta
f': futureCond
t: theta
f: futureCond
e: expr
H: forward P3 emp fc_default e P4 t' f'
H0: P1 ==> P3
H1: P4 ===> P2
H2: inclusion t' t
H3: futureCondEntail f f'
IHforward: forall h1 : heap,
P3 h1 ->
forall (v : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default e h2 rho2 f3 v ->
P4 v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 t' /\
futureCondEntail f' f3

P2 v h2 /\ trace_model rho2 t /\ futureCondEntail f f3

e1, e2: expr
P: hprop
Q, Q1: val -> hprop
t2, t3: theta
f2, f3: futureCond

H0: forall v : val,
forward (Q v) t2 f2 (subst x v e2) Q1 t3 f3
H1: forall (v : val) (h1 : heap),
Q v h1 ->
forall (v0 : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 t2 ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f4 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 f2 (subst x v e2) h2 rho2 f4 v0 ->
Q1 v0 h2 /\
trace_model rho2 t3 /\ futureCondEntail f3 f4
IHforward: forall h1 : heap,
P h1 ->
forall (v : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default e1 h2 rho2 f3 v ->
Q v h2 /\

futureCondEntail f2 f3

P h1 ->
forall (v : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f4 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default (plet x e1 e2) h2 rho2 f4 v ->
Q1 v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 t3 /\ futureCondEntail f3 f4

P: hprop

P h1 ->
forall (v0 : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default (pval v) h2 rho2 f3 v0 ->
(P \* \[v0 = v]) h2 /\
trace_model rho2 emp /\ futureCondEntail fc_default f3

ev0: event
forall h1 : heap,
P h1 ->
forall (v : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default (pevent ev0) h2 rho2 f3 v ->
(P \* \[v = vunit]) h2 /\
trace_model rho2 (theta_singleton ev0) /\
futureCondEntail fc_default f3
b: bool
e1, e2: expr
t: theta
f: futureCond
P: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
H: forward P emp fc_default 
  (if b then e1 else e2) Q t f
IHforward: forall h1 : heap,
P h1 ->
forall (v : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),

  (if b then e1 else e2) h2 rho2 f3 v ->

forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default
  (pif (pval (vbool b)) e1 e2) h2 rho2 f3 v ->
Q v h2 /\ trace_model rho2 t /\ futureCondEntail f f3
loc0: loc
v: Val.value
forall h1 : heap,
(loc0 ~~> v) h1 ->
forall (v0 : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default 
  (pderef (pval (vloc loc0))) h2 rho2 f3 v0 ->
(loc0 ~~> v \* \[v0 = v]) h2 /\
trace_model rho2 emp /\ futureCondEntail fc_default f3

v: val
v': Val.value

(loc0 ~~> v') h1 ->
forall (v0 : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default
  (passign (pval (vloc loc0)) (pval v)) h2 rho2 f3 v0 ->
(loc0 ~~> v \* \[v0 = vunit]) h2 /\
trace_model rho2 emp /\ futureCondEntail fc_default f3

f1: futureCond

P h1 ->
forall (v : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default (passume f1) h2 rho2 f3 v ->
(P \* \[v = vunit]) h2 /\
trace_model rho2 emp /\ futureCondEntail f1 f3

f, f_ctx: futureCond

trace_model rho1 t_ctx ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 f_ctx e h2 rho2 f3 v ->
Q v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 (seq t_ctx t) /\

P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
forall h1 : heap,
P h1 ->
forall (v0 : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default 
  (pref (pval v)) h2 rho2 f3 v0 ->
(P \* h ~~> v \* \[v0 = vloc h]) h2 /\
trace_model rho2
  (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h))) /\
futureCondEntail
  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h))))) f3

f': futureCond

e1, e2: expr
P: hprop
Q, Q1: val -> hprop
t2, t3: theta
f2, f3: futureCond
H: forward P emp fc_default e1 Q t2 f2
H0: forall v : val,
forward (Q v) t2 f2 (subst x v e2) Q1 t3 f3
H1: forall (v : val) (h1 : heap),
Q v h1 ->
forall (v0 : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 t2 ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f4 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 f2 (subst x v e2) h2 rho2 f4 v0 ->
Q1 v0 h2 /\
trace_model rho2 t3 /\ futureCondEntail f3 f4
IHforward: forall h1 : heap,
P h1 ->
forall (v : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default e1 h2 rho2 f3 v ->
Q v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 t2 /\
futureCondEntail f2 f3
forall h1 : heap,
P h1 ->
forall (v : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f4 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default (plet x e1 e2) h2 rho2 f4 v ->
Q1 v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 t3 /\ futureCondEntail f3 f4

trace_model rho2 t3 /\ futureCondEntail f3 f4
h1: heap
rho1: rho
h3: heap
rho3: rho
f4: futureCond
H4: Q v0 h3
H6: trace_model rho3 t2
H7: futureCondEntail f2 f4
H2: P h1
v: val
h2: heap
H3: trace_model rho1 emp
rho2: rho
f0: futureCond
H15: bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default e1 h3 rho3 f4 v0
H16: bigstep h3 rho3 f4 (subst x v0 e2) h2 rho2 f0 v
H5: forall (h1 : heap) (r1 : rho) 
  (f1 : futureCond) (e : expr) 
  (h2 : heap) (r2 : rho) 
  (f2 : futureCond) (v : val) 
  (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 r1 f1 e h2 r2 f2 v ->
futureCondEntail f3 f1 ->
exists f4 : futureCond,
  bigstep h1 r1 f3 e h2 r2 (fc_conj f4 f2) v
Q1 v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 t3 /\ futureCondEntail f3 f0

v: val
P: hprop
forall h1 : heap,
P h1 ->
forall (v0 : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default (pval v) h2 rho2 f3 v0 ->
(P \* \[v0 = v]) h2 /\
trace_model rho2 emp /\ futureCondEntail fc_default f3

(P \* \[v0 = v]) h2 /\
trace_model rho2 emp /\ futureCondEntail fc_default f3

h = h1 ->
r = rho1 ->
f = fc_default ->
v1 = v ->
h1 = h2 ->
rho1 = rho2 ->
fc_default = f3 ->
v = v0 ->
(P \* \[v0 = v0]) h2 /\
trace_model rho2 emp /\
futureCondEntail fc_default fc_default

P: hprop
ev0: event
forall h1 : heap,
P h1 ->
forall (v : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default (pevent ev0) h2 rho2 f3 v ->
(P \* \[v = vunit]) h2 /\
trace_model rho2 (theta_singleton ev0) /\
futureCondEntail fc_default f3

  
P: hprop
ev0: event
h1: heap
H0: P h1
v: val
h2: heap
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
rho2: rho
f3: futureCond
H2: bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default 
  (pevent ev0) h2 rho2 f3 v

trace_model rho2 (theta_singleton ev0) /\
futureCondEntail fc_default f3

trace_model rho2 emp /\ futureCondEntail fc_default f3

h1: heap
H0: (loc0 ~~> v') h1

H11: Fmap.indom h1 loc0
vunit = vunit

P: hprop
f1: futureCond
forall h1 : heap,
P h1 ->
forall (v : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default (passume f1) h2 rho2 f3 v ->
(P \* \[v = vunit]) h2 /\
trace_model rho2 emp /\ futureCondEntail f1 f3

  
P: hprop
f1: futureCond
h1: heap
H0: P h1
v: val
h2: heap
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
rho2: rho
f3: futureCond
H2: bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default 
  (passume f1) h2 rho2 f3 v
(P \* \[v = vunit]) h2 /\
trace_model rho2 emp /\ futureCondEntail f1 f3

  
P: hprop
f1: futureCond
h1: heap
H0: P h1
v: val
h2: heap
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
rho2: rho
f3: futureCond
forall (h : heap) (r : rho) (f f_assume : futureCond),
h = h1 ->
r = rho1 ->
f = fc_default ->
f_assume = f1 ->
h1 = h2 ->
rho1 = rho2 ->
fc_conj fc_default f1 = f3 ->
vunit = v ->
(P \* \[vunit = vunit]) h2 /\
trace_model rho2 emp /\
futureCondEntail f1 (fc_conj fc_default f1)

f1: futureCond
h1: heap

f3: futureCond
h: heap
r: rho
f, f_assume: futureCond
H: h = h1
H3: r = rho1
H4: f = fc_default
H6: f_assume = f1
H5: h1 = h2
H7: rho1 = rho2
H8: fc_conj fc_default f1 = f3
H9: vunit = v
(P \* \[vunit = vunit]) h2 /\
trace_model rho2 emp /\
futureCondEntail f1 (fc_conj fc_default f1)

fromal_arg: var
e: expr
actual_arg: val
P: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
t: theta
f: futureCond
H: forward P emp fc_default
  (subst fromal_arg actual_arg e) Q t f
IHforward: forall h1 : heap,
P h1 ->
forall (v : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default
  (subst fromal_arg actual_arg e) h2 rho2
  f3 v ->
Q v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 t /\
futureCondEntail f f3
forall h1 : heap,
P h1 ->
forall (v : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default
  (papp (pval (vfun fromal_arg e)) (pval actual_arg))
  h2 rho2 f3 v ->
Q v h2 /\ trace_model rho2 t /\ futureCondEntail f f3

P: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
t: theta
f, f_ctx: futureCond
t_ctx: theta
f_ctx': futureCond
e: expr
H: forward P emp fc_default e Q t f
H0: futureSubtraction f_ctx t f_ctx'
IHforward: forall h1 : heap,
P h1 ->
forall (v : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default e h2 rho2 f3 v ->
Q v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 t /\
futureCondEntail f f3
forall h1 : heap,
P h1 ->
forall (v : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 t_ctx ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 f_ctx e h2 rho2 f3 v ->
Q v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 (seq t_ctx t) /\
futureCondEntail (fc_conj f_ctx' f) f3

Q: val -> hprop
t: theta
f, f_ctx: futureCond
t_ctx: theta
f_ctx': futureCond
e: expr

H0: futureSubtraction f_ctx t f_ctx'

bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default e h2 rho2 f3 v ->
Q v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 t /\
futureCondEntail f f3

Q: val -> hprop
t: theta

t_ctx: theta
f_ctx': futureCond
e: expr
H: forward P emp fc_default e Q t f
H0: futureSubtraction f_ctx t f_ctx'
h1: heap
v: val
IHforward: forall (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default e h2 rho2 f3 v ->
Q v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 t /\
futureCondEntail f f3
H1: P h1
h2: heap
rho1: rho
H2: trace_model rho1 t_ctx
rho2: rho
f3: futureCond
H3: bigstep h1 rho1 f_ctx e h2 rho2 f3 v
H4: forall (h1 : heap) (rho1 : rho) 
  (f1 : futureCond) (e : expr) 
  (h2 : heap) (rho2 : rho) 
  (f2 : futureCond) (v : val) 
  (rho0 : rho) (f : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 f1 e h2 rho2 f2 v ->
exists (rho3 : list event) 
(f3 : futureCond),
  bigstep h1 rho0 f e h2 (rho0 ++ rho3) f3 v /\
  rho2 = rho1 ++ rho3
Q v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 (seq t_ctx t) /\
futureCondEntail (fc_conj f_ctx' f) f3

  
P: hprop
Q: val -> hprop
t: theta
f, f_ctx: futureCond
t_ctx: theta
f_ctx': futureCond
e: expr
H: forward P emp fc_default e Q t f
H0: futureSubtraction f_ctx t f_ctx'
h1: heap
v: val
IHforward: forall (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default e h2 rho2 f3 v ->
Q v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 t /\
futureCondEntail f f3
H1: P h1
h2: heap
rho1: rho
H2: trace_model rho1 t_ctx
rho2: rho
f3: futureCond
H3: bigstep h1 rho1 f_ctx e h2 rho2 f3 v
H4: exists (rho3 : list event) 
(f3 : futureCond),
  bigstep h1 nil fc_default e h2 
    (nil ++ rho3) f3 v /\ 
  rho2 = rho1 ++ rho3
Q v h2 /\
trace_model rho2 (seq t_ctx t) /\
futureCondEntail (fc_conj f_ctx' f) f3

H8: trace_model rho3 t
H9: futureCondEntail f f0
H1: P h1
rho1: rho
H2: trace_model rho1 t_ctx
f3: futureCond
H3: bigstep h1 rho1 f_ctx e h2 (rho1 ++ rho3) f3 v
H5: bigstep h1 nil fc_default e h2 rho3 f0 v
H6: futureCondEntail (fc_conj f_ctx' f0) f3
H7: futureCondEntail (fc_conj f_ctx' f)
  (fc_conj f_ctx' f0) ->
futureCondEntail (fc_conj f_ctx' f0) f3 ->
futureCondEntail (fc_conj f_ctx' f) f3
futureCondEntail (fc_conj f_ctx' f) f_ctx'

f3: futureCond

  exact H6.

  
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
forall h1 : heap,
P h1 ->
forall (v0 : val) (h2 : heap) (rho1 : rho),
trace_model rho1 emp ->
forall (rho2 : rho) (f3 : futureCond),
bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default (pref (pval v)) h2 rho2 f3
  v0 ->
(P \* h ~~> v \* \[v0 = vloc h]) h2 /\
trace_model rho2
  (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h))) /\
futureCondEntail
  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h))))) f3

  
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
v0: val
h2: heap
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
rho2: rho
f3: futureCond
H2: bigstep h1 rho1 fc_default 
  (pref (pval v)) h2 rho2 f3 v0
(P \* h ~~> v \* \[v0 = vloc h]) h2 /\
trace_model rho2
  (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h))) /\
futureCondEntail
  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h))))) f3

  
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
v0: val
h2: heap
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
rho2: rho
f3: futureCond
forall (h0 : Fmap.fmap Logic.loc Val.value) (r : rho)
  (f : futureCond) (loc0 : Logic.loc) (v1 : val)
  (f' : futureCond),
~ Fmap.indom h1 loc0 ->
futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist f' ->
h0 = h1 ->
r = rho1 ->
f = fc_default ->
v1 = v ->
Fmap.update h1 loc0 v = h2 ->
rho1 ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist = rho2 ->
fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc loc0))) = f3 ->
vloc loc0 = v0 ->
(P \* h ~~> v \* \[vloc loc0 = vloc h])
  (Fmap.update h1 loc0 v) /\
trace_model
  (rho1 ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist)
  (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h))) /\
futureCondEntail
  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc loc0))))

  
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
v0: val
h2: heap
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
rho2: rho
f3: futureCond
h0: Fmap.fmap Logic.loc Val.value
r: rho
f: futureCond
loc0: Logic.loc
v1: val
f': futureCond
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 loc0
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist f'
H4: h0 = h1
H5: r = rho1
H6: f = fc_default
H: v1 = v
H8: Fmap.update h1 loc0 v = h2
H9: rho1 ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist =
rho2
H10: fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc loc0))) =
f3
H11: vloc loc0 = v0
(P \* h ~~> v \* \[vloc loc0 = vloc h])
  (Fmap.update h1 loc0 v) /\
trace_model
  (rho1 ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc loc0) :: nil)%mylist)
  (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h))) /\
futureCondEntail
  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc loc0))))

P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho

f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
H: forall (A B : Type) (h1 h2 : Fmap.fmap A B),
Fmap.disjoint h1 h2 -> h1 \u h2 = h2 \u h1
(P \* h ~~> v \* \[vloc h = vloc h])
  (Fmap.single h v \u h1)

  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
H: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single h v) h1 ->
Fmap.single h v \u h1 = h1 \u Fmap.single h v
(P \* h ~~> v \* \[vloc h = vloc h])
  (Fmap.single h v \u h1)

v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1

  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'

  (rho1 ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist)
  (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h))) /\

P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
H: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single h v) h1 ->
Fmap.single h v \u h1 = h1 \u Fmap.single h v
H2: forall (A B : Type) (h : Fmap.fmap A B) 
  (x : A) (v : B),
~ Fmap.indom h x ->
Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single x v) h
(P \* h ~~> v \* \[vloc h = vloc h])
  (Fmap.single h v \u h1)

v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1

  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
trace_model
  (rho1 ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist)
  (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h))) /\
futureCondEntail
  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc h))))

  
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
H: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single h v) h1 ->
Fmap.single h v \u h1 = h1 \u Fmap.single h v
H2: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single h v) h1
(P \* h ~~> v \* \[vloc h = vloc h])
  (Fmap.single h v \u h1)

v: val

H0: P h1
rho1: rho

f': futureCond

H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
trace_model
  (rho1 ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist)
  (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h))) /\
futureCondEntail
  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc h))))

H2: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single h v) h1

(p ~~> v) (Fmap.single p v)
(h ~~> v \* \[vloc h = vloc h]) (Fmap.single h v)

  (* Search (_ \* _). *)
  
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
H: Fmap.single h v \u h1 = h1 \u Fmap.single h v
H2: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single h v) h1
H4: (h ~~> v) (Fmap.single h v)
H5: forall (P : Prop) (H : hprop) (h : heap),
(\[P] \* H) h = (P /\ H h)
(h ~~> v \* \[vloc h = vloc h]) (Fmap.single h v)
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond

  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
trace_model
  (rho1 ++ (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist)
  (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h))) /\
futureCondEntail
  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc h))))

  (* Search (_ \* _).  *)

H: Fmap.single h v \u h1 = h1 \u Fmap.single h v
H2: Fmap.disjoint (Fmap.single h v) h1
H4: (h ~~> v) (Fmap.single h v)
H5: forall (P : Prop) (H : hprop) (h : heap),
(\[P] \* H) h = (P /\ H h)
(\[vloc h = vloc h] \* h ~~> v) (Fmap.single h v)

(vloc h = vloc h /\ (h ~~> v) (Fmap.single h v))

        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc h))))

  
P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
f': futureCond
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist f'
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
trace_model (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist
  (theta_singleton (ev "malloc" (vloc h)))

futureCondEntail
  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))
  (fc_conj f' (fc_finally (ev "free" (vloc h))))

ev "malloc" (vloc h) = ev "malloc" (vloc h)

P: hprop
v: val
h: loc
h1: heap
H0: P h1
rho1: rho
H1: trace_model rho1 emp
H7: futureSubtraction_linear fc_default
  (ev "malloc" (vloc h) :: nil)%mylist fc_default
H3: ~ Fmap.indom h1 h
futureCondEntail
  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))
  (fc_singleton
     (seq trace_default
        (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))

  exact (futureCondEntail_exact (fc_singleton (seq trace_default (theta_singleton (ev "free" (vloc h)))))).

Qed.

Module Examples.

Definition e1 := (pval vunit).


forward \[] emp fc_default e1
  (fun res : val => \[] \* \[res = vunit]) emp
  fc_default


forward \[] emp fc_default e1
  (fun res : val => \[] \* \[res = vunit]) emp
  fc_default

  
H: forall (v : val) (P : hprop),
forward P emp fc_default (pval v)
  (fun res : val => P \* \[res = v]) emp
  fc_default
forward \[] emp fc_default e1
  (fun res : val => \[] \* \[res = vunit]) emp
  fc_default

  
H: forward \[] emp fc_default (pval vunit)
  (fun res : val => \[] \* \[res = vunit]) emp
  fc_default
forward \[] emp fc_default e1
  (fun res : val => \[] \* \[res = vunit]) emp
  fc_default

  exact H.
Qed.

Definition e2 := (pval vunit).

End Examples.
